{{CargoRelic
|name=Galton Board
|class_id=22191
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-21
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.12%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Jun 21, 1884 AD, the world's first Galton board was created, marking a historic achievement in the statistical experiment.<br>The Galton Board was invented by British scientist Galton. It consists of a wooden plank with iron nails evenly distributed on it, a vertical groove of equal width at the bottom, and a funnel-shaped entrance at the top. When throwing a small amount of balls into the entrance, the number of balls in each groove at the bottom will be randomly distributed; after putting in a large number of balls, the number of balls in each groove will appear to have a normal distribution. This experiment demonstrates the statistical laws and fluctuating phenomena of a large number of accidental incidents, and it clarifies the concepts of statistics and distribution in physics.
|fame=45
|art=31
|fth=51
|civ=34
|tech=67
|ss1=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +2<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss2=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +3<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss3=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +4<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +4<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss4=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +6<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss5=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +8<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +8<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss7=Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +8<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail RUSH +8<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500<br>Snail DEF +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill II.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: This Relic's TECH +10
|skill2=[[File:Timemachine skill II.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Generate Time Chests by +15%
}}
